abilities.name: Gain Red Mana and Crystal
abilities.text: Gain a red mana token and a red crystal to your Inventory.

abilities.name: Gain Blue Mana and Crystal
abilities.text: Gain a blue mana token and a blue crystal to your Inventory.

abilities.name: Freeze
abilities.text: Target enemy does not attack this combat and it gets Armor -3 (to a minimum of 1).

abilities.name: Gain Mana
abilities.text: Gain 2 mana tokens of any colors

abilities.name: Cold Fire Attack or Cold Fire Block
abilities.text: Cold Fire Attack or Cold Fire Block 5. You can pay a blue or red mana to increase this to 7, or pay both to increase this to 9.

abilities.name: Elemental Mastery
abilities.text: Pay a black mana: Choose one: All attacks you play this combat become Cold Fire Attacks, or all your attacks become Siege Attacks in addition to any elements they have.

abilities.name: Block
abilities.text: Block 8. Counts twice against an attack with Swiftness.

abilities.name: Grant Resistances
abilities.text: All units you control gain all resistances this turn.

abilities.name: Influence
abilities.text: Influence 5. If used during interaction, Reputation +1.

abilities.name: Influence
abilities.text: Influence 5. If used during interaction, Reputation +1.

abilities.name: Influence
abilities.text: Influence 5. If used during interaction, Reputation +1.

abilities.name: Influence
abilities.text: Influence 5. If used during interaction, Reputation +1.

abilities.name: Remove Fortifications
abilities.text: Chosen enemy loses all fortifications. Ranged Attack 3.

abilities.name: Remove Resistances
abilities.text: Chosen enemy loses all resistances. Ranged Attack 3.

abilities.name: Destroy If Blocked
abilities.text: Target enemy is destroyed if blocked.

abilities.name: Weaken Armor
abilities.text: Armor of target enemy is reduced by 5 (to a minimum of 1).

abilities.name: Strip Defenses
abilities.text: Target enemy loses all fortifications and resistances.
